description: The function computes missing offsets in the replica relative to the primary.
The function returns the list of missing offsets.
If the offset in primary is less than the offset in replica, it appends the primary offset to the missing list.
If the offset in replica is less than the offset in primary, it increments the replica index.
If the last missing offset is equal to the last replica offset, it drops the last missing offset.

conditions: not missing or not replica or (not missing[-1] == replica[-1])
description: If the last missing offset is not equal to the last replica offset, it does not drop the last missing offset.
The while loop iterates until the end of either the primary or replica list is reached.
